name: FF13 Fix
author: rebtd7
summary: Essential PC-port fix: removes the frame pacer/stutter, fixes vibration, and (via dxvk.conf) forces 16x anisotropic texture filtering. On by default.
credit: FF13Fix by rebtd7 (a fork of OneTweakNG by Nucleoprotein), GPL-3.0 — see LICENSES/. dxvk.conf forces 16x anisotropic filtering. d3d9.dll/FF13Fix.ini bundled under the GPL.
